title: fraxinus syriaca var. oligophylla
intro: Fraxinus syriaca var. oligophylla, also known as the Syrian ash or narrow-leaved ash, is a variety of the ash tree native to the Middle East. This deciduous tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fraxinus syriaca var. oligophylla include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
